models.WizardStep: A step in the wizard flow, with id, label, icon, and completion status.
models.PhotoUpload: Uploaded dental photo with base64 data, quality score, and type classification.
models.AnalysisResult: AI-generated clinical analysis including detected teeth, treatments, and observations.
models.DSDResult: Digital Smile Design simulation result with layer images and suggestions.
models.ToothDetection: Single detected tooth with number, treatment type, priority, and clinical notes.
models.PatientData: Patient information: name, date of birth, age.

relationships: WizardStep contains the flow sequence for both Full and Quick case modes
PhotoUpload feeds into AnalysisResult via AI edge function
AnalysisResult contains ToothDetection array and feeds into DSDResult
DSDResult provides simulation layers for clinical review
PatientData is entered at review step and attached to the created case

findings: Excesso de tecido gengival, coroa clínica curta

observations: Sorriso com boa exposição dentária e linha labial média
Assimetria gengival leve entre 11 e 21 — avaliar gengivoplastia
Proporção largura/altura dos centrais dentro do ideal (75-80%)

budgetOptions.label: Premium
budgetOptions.description: Protocolo estético avançado com mais camadas
